ddt:Target.Name: Cluster X07ph2_EV_V1.3

Data.Name: L0_Value
Data.Comment: This parameter is the measure of fuel gauge sensor converted in litre using Vx_FUNC_Rx table.

Item.Text: Battery voltage too low for measure
Meas not possible - delay since Ign OFF < 1 mn
Display corresponds to the stored value

Data.Name: Oil_Level_Input._DeltaU
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: Oil_Level_Input._VbattU2
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: Oil_Level_Input._U2
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: Oil_Level_Input._VbattU1
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: Oil_Level_Input._U1
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Comment: Numero de calibration en Hexa

Data.Name: DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Diag evolution number

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software identification number

Data.Name: SupplierNumber.ITG
Data.Comment: Supplier ITG code

Data.Name: EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Software version(edition) number

Data.Name: PartNumber.BasicPartList
Data.Comment: 5Digits - Forcé à $02 (signifiant le type de SW)

Data.Name: HardwareNumber.BasicPartList
Data.Comment: 5Digits - Forcé à $01 (signifiant le type de HW)

Data.Name: SupplierNumber
Data.Comment: Supplier code (hexa)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjt failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Lost CAN communication or BUS OFF

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Spare Part Number Approval Reference Number
Data.Comment: Numéro d'homologation

Data.Name: ClusterProductionDate_ASCII
Data.Comment: Date de production du TdB (format ddmmyy)

Data.Name: ClusterProductionNumber_ASCII
Data.Comment: numéro de série unique du tdb

Data.Name: OutputControlStatus
Data.Comment: Testing output : Status

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: VIN In ASCII

Data.Name: networkConfB1
Data.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service CAN V

Data.Name: networkConfB2
Data.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service CAN V

Data.Name: Telltales_Control
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently all telltales (internal and external) driven by the micro

Data.Name: Sound_Control
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently the sound(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Item.Text: All sounds (BUIC file) in order with blank of 1 s

Data.Name: Display_Control
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently the display(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Data.Name: Pointer_Control
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently pointer(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Data.Name: Backlight_Control
Data.Comment: This service is able to manage permanently the backlight(s) driven by the microcontroller.

Data.Name: GearBoxType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the GearBox type (manual or automatic) of the vehicle.

Data.Name: CarburationType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the carburation type of the vehicle.

Data.Name: DistanceUnit_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the distance unit type (km or miles).

Data.Name: VolumeUnit_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the volume unit (manual or automatic) of the vehicle.

Data.Name: TripComputerType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the trip computer type displayed.

Data.Name: CCSLACCServiceCustomer_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows type of speed control

Data.Name: FrontSBRInhibition_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows the activation or not of Front Seat Belt Reminder warning (sound & Flashing)

Data.Name: ESCPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ESC ECU.

Data.Name: TPMSPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of TPMS

Data.Name: OverspeedWarningPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of overspeed warning (10204_1).

Data.Name: PowerSteeringType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the type of the power steering.

Data.Name: DayBacklightsPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to force the backlight of the cluster to be ON in day mode.
Data.Description: This configuration is used to force the backlight of the cluster to be ON in day mode. This parameter has no effect on night mode backlight management.

Data.Name: OilPressureThreshold_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used for the oil pressure warning.
Data.Description: This configuration is used for the oil pressure warning. If the value = 11111b then cluster uses the CAN parameter for this warning (no else oil pressure sensor is an input of the cluster).

Data.Name: EMMPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of EMM ECU

Data.Name: BodyType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the body type.

Data.Name: RearSBRPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of rear Seat Belt Reminder.

Data.Name: ExternalTemperaturePresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the external temperature management.
Data.Description: Note 1: When the “EXTERNAL_TEMPERATURE_PRESENT” parameter is at 01b, it means that External Temperature sensor acquisition is not managed directly by the cluster

Data.Name: AirbagPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of AIRBAG ECU.

Data.Name: TelematicSystemPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the telematic system Type.

Item.Text: 101b = MFD and/or BIC (steering wheel switches DAI)

Data.Name: FirstWarningThresholdMaintenanceScheduleInKm_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in km.
Data.Description: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilometer (ValConfigSeuilAlerte1_Km in 65450-2009-45-CDC_CLUSTER_X98).

Data.Name: TemperatureUnit_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter defines the default temperature unit that must be displayed by the Cluster ECU.

Data.Name: MuteRadioFunction_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter defines the default temperature unit that must be displayed by the Cluster ECU.

Data.Name: ClockDisplayMode_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the format display of the clock.

Data.Name: DimmingStrategy_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the strategy of dimming.

Data.Name: DigitalSpeedometerPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the present and the unit of the digital speed.

Data.Name: ClusterCurrentDistanceByDiag_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows R/W of the total current_distance (see EN_ODO_012), with a resolution of 1km.
Data.Description: This parameter allows R/W of the total current_distance (see EN_ODO_012), with a resolution of 1km. A write request is irreversible

Data.Name: L2Displayed1_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone – Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: L2Displayed2_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 2 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_2.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 1/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_2.

Data.Name: L2Displayed3_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 3 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_3.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 2/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_3.

Data.Name: L2Displayed4_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 4 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_4.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 3/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_4.

Data.Name: L2Displayed5_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 5 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_5.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 4/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_5.

Data.Name: L2Displayed6_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 6 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_6.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 5/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_6.

Data.Name: L2Displayed7_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 7 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_7.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 6/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_7.

Data.Name: L2Displayed8_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 8 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_8.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 7/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_8.

Data.Name: VolumeFuelWarning_CF
Data.Comment: The "C_VALERTE_CARBURANT" parameter defines the threshold below low fuel level warning occurs.

Data.Name: FuelGaugingType_CF
Data.Comment: The "FuelGaugingType_CF" parameter defines the fuel gauging type, with fuel flow strategy or not

Data.Name: ClockDisplayed_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the diplay of the clock (10106_1).

Item.Text: 00b = Not displayed / not Managed => RTC off

Data.Name: AdditionnalInstrumentPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of Additional Instrument.

Data.Name: CountrySpecificity_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the country specificity.

Data.Name: FCWPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of FCW feature.

Data.Name: SBRLogic_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the logic of SBR feature.

Data.Name: HandBrakeState
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: BrakeFluidLevelState
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: FuelGaugeValue
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: BatteryVoltage
Data.Comment: Physical Input

Data.Name: TripDistanceKm
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: TripFuelUsed
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: TripTimer
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: Language_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the language used for messages displayed.

Data.Name: DayRunningLightUserSetPrefPresent_CF
Data.Comment: Configuration des feux de jour

Data.Name: TripComputerScrollControlSwitchAcquisition_CF
Data.Comment: Configuration du type ADAC pour Daimler

Item.Text: L2 is initialized with RecalageL2off_L0 threshold
L2 is initialized with Diag request
L2 is initialized with RecalageL2_EnAPC threshold

Data.Name: L0onValueDuringFuelReadjustment
Data.Comment: The "L0ON_VALUE_DURING_FUEL_UPDATE" parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update wh
Data.Description: The “L0on_VALUE_during_fuel_update” parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update whatever the fuel update cause.

Data.Name: L3ValueDuringFuelReadjustment
Data.Comment: The "L3_VALUE_DURING_FUEL_UPDATE" parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update what
Data.Description: The “l3_value_during_fuel_update” parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update whatever the fuel update cause.

Data.Name: L2offValueDuringFuelReadjustment
Data.Comment: The "L2OFF_VALUE_DURING_FUEL_UPDATE" parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update w
Data.Description: The “L2off_VALUE_during_fuel_update” parameter keeps the value present during the last fuel update whatever the fuel update cause.

Data.Name: NumberResetsCausedByFailures
Data.Comment: The "NUMBER_RESETS_CAUSED_BY_FAILURES" parameter is used to count the number of resets caused by fai
Data.Description: The “number_resets_caused_by_failures” parameter is used to count the number of resets caused by failures (e.g. watchdog)

Data.Name: ExternalECUDistanceBeforeOdoReadjustment
Data.Comment: The cluster stored distance before readjustment (in case of CAN incoherence or Cluster incoherence,
Data.Description: The cluster stored distance before readjustment (in case of CAN incoherence or Cluster incoherence, see EN_ODO_036 and EN_ODO_040). The stored distance is the value of CAN received parameter before readjusting.

Data.Name: ClusterDistanceBeforeOdoReadjustment
Data.Comment: The cluster stores cluster current distance before readjustement (in case of CAN incoherence or Clus
Data.Description: The cluster stores cluster current distance before readjustement (in case of CAN incoherence or Cluster incoherence, see EN_ODO_036 and EN_ODO_040). The stored distance is the last value of cluster_current_distance calculated parameter before readjusting.

Data.Name: DistanceUpdateByDiagCounter
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance update number with DIAG request.

Data.Name: DistanceUpdateByExternalECUCounter
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance readjustment number with external ECU
Data.Description: This parameter allows identifying the Cluster_current_distance readjustment number with external ECU (ABS or ECM) request (number of readjustment due to an cluster incoherence, see EN_ODO_040).

Data.Name: PartNumber.Hardware
Data.Comment: Daimler

Data.Name: PartNumber.Software
Data.Comment: Daimler

Data.Name: MSCChangeInitialDistanceInKM_CF
Data.Comment: This is the intial value displayed for the maintenance Schedule Change in km

Data.Name: MSCChangeInitialDurationInDay_CF
Data.Comment: This is the intial value displayed for the maintenance Schedule Change in time

Data.Name: MSCChangeUsualDistanceInKM
Data.Comment: This is the current value displayed for the maintenance Schedule Change in km

Data.Name: MSCChangeUsualDurationInDay
Data.Comment: This is the current value displayed for the maintenance Schedule Change in time

Data.Name: GaugingThreshold.High_CF
Data.Comment: The High_CF is used for L1 gauging strategy

Data.Name: GaugingThreshold.Low_CF
Data.Comment: The Low_CF is used for L1 gauging strategy

Data.Name: BlackIceWarningInhibition_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the activation of Black Ice Warning (Daimler)

Data.Name: AdditionnalInstrumentPartNumber_Ref_Daimler
Data.Comment: Daimler part number of AIC for identification in plant

Data.Name: AdditionnalInstrumentPartNumber_Ref_Renault
Data.Comment: Daimler part number of AIC for identification in plant (equivalent ref Renault)

Data.Name: ECOScoreInhibition_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the activation of ECO Score calculation and display

Data.Name: CCSLOverspeedBuzzerPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows additionnal sound to an overspeed HMI for speedlimiter

Data.Name: LDWPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of LDW feature.

Data.Name: SBRModuleType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the link communication for SBR Module

Data.Name: TCU_EcallPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying if the TCU and Ecall function are present

Item.Text: 0 = without TCU or With TCU/Without Ecall (frame loss HMI filtered)
1 = With TCU/With Ecal (frame loss HMI not filtered)

Data.Name: TripDistanceKm_START
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: TripFuelUsed_START
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: TripTimer_START
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for trip computer calculations.

Data.Name: Output Permanent Control List
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: Output Control Command
Data.Comment: Testing output : Command enumeration

Data.Name: OCSPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of OCS (Oil Control System).

Data.Name: StopStartPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of SSCU ECU.

Data.Name: SmartChargingPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to activate/deactivate the presence of the Smart Charging function.

Data.Name: RRPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence and activation Radarbased Recuperation System (EV)

Data.Name: StartUpAnimationDisplay_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter is specific start up animation for EV

Item.Text: Lost CAN communication or BUS OFF
Lost LIN communication or BUS OFF

Data.Name: MaintenanceLevelFlag_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying if it's High Level or Low Level of Service autonomy

Data.Name: MSCDurationInDay_Elapsed
Data.Comment: This is the current value displayed for the maintenance Schedule Change in km

Data.Name: MSCDistanceInKM_Elapsed
Data.Comment: This is the current value displayed for the maintenance Schedule Change in km

Data.Name: LINFailureCounter.LIN_BusOffCounter
Data.Comment: This parameter display some counter about LIN Failure

Data.Name: LINFailureCounter.LIN_AICLossCounter
Data.Comment: This parameter display some counter about LIN Failure

Data.Name: LINFailureCounter.LIN_SBRModuleLossCounter
Data.Comment: This parameter display some counter about LIN Failure

Data.Name: LINFailureCounter.LIN_SBRModuleConfigErrorCounter
Data.Comment: This parameter display some counter about LIN Failure

Data.Name: AmbientLightPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of Ambient Light feature.

Data.Name: AT_BeepInRPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying thepresence of Rear beep feature.

Data.Name: CauseOfLastTripComputerStart
Data.Comment: Raison du reset de l'ordinateur de bord from start (Daimler)

Data.Name: CauseOfLastTripComputerReset
Data.Comment: Raison du reset de l'ordinateur de bord from reset

Data.Name: ECOModePresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows ECO Mode feature on Cluster

Data.Name: LINFailureCounter.RESERVED
Data.Comment: data not used

Data.Name: AEBSPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of AEBS ECU.

Item.Text: Rear wiper when rear gear engaged not present
Rear wiper when rear gear engaged present

Data.Name: AnalogInput.OnSWRC.Vol plus
Data.Comment: =1 if pressed

Data.Name: AnalogInput.OnSWRC.Vol moins
Data.Comment: =1 if pressed

Data.Name: AnalogInput.OnSWRC.ADAC OK
Data.Comment: =1 if pressed

Data.Name: AnalogInput.OnSWRC.Vol plus since reset
Data.Comment: =1 if pressed since start

Data.Name: AnalogInput.OnSWRC.Vol moins since reset
Data.Comment: =1 if pressed since start

Data.Name: AnalogInput.OnSWRC.ADAC OK since reset
Data.Comment: =1 if pressed since start

Data.Name: AnalogInput.OnSWRC.ADAC DOWN
Data.Comment: =1 if pressed

Data.Name: AnalogInput.OnSWRC.ADAC UP
Data.Comment: =1 if pressed

Data.Name: AnalogInput.OnSWRC.ADAC Up since reset
Data.Comment: =1 if pressed since start

Data.Name: AnalogInput.OnSWRC.ADAC DOWN since reset
Data.Comment: =1 if pressed since start

Data.Name: AnalogInput.OnSWRC.Push to Talk since reset
Data.Comment: =1 if pressed since start

Data.Name: AnalogInput.OnSWRC.Push to Talk
Data.Comment: =1 if pressed

Data.Name: BatteryWarningType_CF
Data.Comment: Indicate by which signal the battery warning shall be triggered (wire or CAN)

Data.Name: FuelRangeDisplayThreshold_CF
Data.Comment: Allows the modification of the fuel volume threshold used to display the fuel autonomy ADAC page

Data.Name: EVStartupSoundInhibition_CF
Data.Comment: States if Startup sound present or not

Data.Name: ChargingScreenActivation_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is relevant for Electric and PHEV vehicles (def value = 0)

Data.Name: MaxElecPower_TP
Data.Comment: indicates in real time the electrical power used for the vehicle traction when engine is on

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: DataRead.Mux
Request.Comment: Frame diagnostic netwok MUX

Request.Name: DataRead.Tracability
Request.Comment: Lecture - Traceability Information

Request.Name: OutputControl
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: DataRead.VIN
Request.Comment: Standardized read VIN request

Request.Name: DataWrite.VIN
Request.Comment: Standardized write VIN request

Request.Name: Routine_Service.Maintenance schedule reset
Request.Comment: The Cluster ECU shall provide "the maintenance schedule reset" routine, Routine ID = $02.

Request.Name: Routine_Service.Synchronization of the total DISTANCE between Cluster ECU and external ECU
Request.Comment: The Cluster ECU shall provide "Synchronization of the total DISTANCE between Cluster ECU and external ECU" routine, Routine ID = $03

Request.Name: Routine_Service.To zero Trip Computer Variables and L2 and LBackUp updates
Request.Comment: The Cluster ECU shall provide "To zero ADAC simulation command + L2 and LBackUp updates" routine, Routine ID = $01

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: DataWrite.FrontSBRInhibition_CF
Request.Comment: Careful, don't display this action on a screen

Request.Name: DataWrite.ClusterCurrentDistanceByDiag_CF
Request.Comment: A write request is irreversible

Request.Name: DataRead.S3
Request.Comment: The "C_S3" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS3 and kMajS3)

Request.Name: DataWrite.S3
Request.Comment: The "C_S3" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS3 and kMajS3)

Request.Name: DataRead.S2
Request.Comment: The "C_S2" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS2 and kMajS2)

Request.Name: DataWrite.S2
Request.Comment: The "C_S2" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS2 and kMajS2)

Request.Name: DataRead.S1
Request.Comment: The "C_S1" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS1 and kMajS1)

Request.Name: DataWrite.S1
Request.Comment: The "C_S1" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (kMinS1 and kMajS1)

Request.Name: DataRead.VehicleConfigurationCANVB1
Request.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service $21 $B1

Request.Name: DataRead.VehicleConfigurationCANVB2
Request.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service $21 $B2

Request.Name: DataWrite.VehicleConfigurationCANVB1
Request.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service $3B $B1

Request.Name: DataWrite.VehicleConfigurationCANVB2
Request.Comment: Vehicle Configuration service $3B $B2

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request for old ECU

Request.Name: DataRead.GaugingThreshold
Request.Comment: The "C_SEUILS" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (SEUIL_H and SEUIL_B)

Request.Name: DataWrite.GaugingThreshold
Request.Comment: The "C_SEUILS" parameter is used to define 2 parameters (SEUIL_H and SEUIL_B)

Request.Name: DataRead.MaintenanceLevelFlag_CF
Request.Comment: Read MaintenanceLevelFlag_CF

Request.Name: DataWrite.MaintenanceLevelFlag_CF
Request.Comment: Write MaintenanceLevelFlag_CF

Request.Name: DataRead.MSCDurationInDay_Elapsed
Request.Comment: Read MSCDurationInDay_Elapsed

Request.Name: DataRead.MSCDistanceInKM_Elapsed
Request.Comment: Read MSCDistanceInKM_Elapsed

Request.Name: DataRead.SBRModuleType_CF
Request.Comment: Read SBRModuleType_CF

Request.Name: DataWrite.SBRModuleType_CF
Request.Comment: Write SBRModuleType_CF

Request.Name: DataRead.LINFailureCounter
Request.Comment: Read LIN_BusOffCounter

Request.Name: DataRead.AmbientLightPresent_CF
Request.Comment: Read AmbientLightPresent_CF

Request.Name: DataWrite.AmbientLightPresent_CF
Request.Comment: Write AmbientLightPresent_CF

Request.Name: DataRead.TCU_EcallPresent_CF
Request.Comment: Read TCU_EcallPresent_CF

Request.Name: DataWrite.TCU_EcallPresent_CF
Request.Comment: Write TCU_EcallPresent_CF

Request.Name: DataRead.AT_BeepInRPresent_CF
Request.Comment: Read AT_BeepInRPresent_CF

Request.Name: DataWrite.AT_BeepInRPresent_CF
Request.Comment: Write AT_BeepInRPresent_CF

Request.Name: DataRead.Spare Part Number Approval Reference Number
Request.Comment: READ - Références Pièces - Numéro d'homologation

DataItem.Name: Spare Part Number Approval Reference Number

Request.Name: DataRead.ECOModePresent_CF
Request.Comment: Read AmbientLightPresent_CF

Test.Description: can be circhuit short to battery too
coincide with short to +6V at micro side
coincide with circuit short to battery

Device.Name: Lost CAN communication or BUS OFF
Lost LIN communication or BUS OFF

Send.RequestName: Routine_Service.Synchronization of the total DISTANCE between Cluster ECU and external ECU
DataRead.Spare Part Number Approval Reference Number

Display.DataName: Spare Part Number Approval Reference Number
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Spare Part Number Approval Reference Number
